case_title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. VS. KENYA CABRERA

REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE (TRANSACTION ID # 78646538) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.

PLAINTIFF SHALL SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM TO THE COURT'S RULING AND A PROPOSED JUDGMENT CONFORMING TO THE REQUIREMENTS IN THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE AND CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT, IDEALLY ON THE APPROPRIATE JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM. calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2026 Continued To Aug-11-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement
Off Calendar May-18-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement.

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase bank, N.A.'s unopposed Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing and consistent with the parties' agreement and Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6, judgment shall be entered as follows: Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase bank, N.A.'s shall recover from Defendant Kenya Cabrera $2,650 in principal and $0 in costs, for a total judgment of $2,650. This is the judgment authorized by the settlement agreement and related events.

Plaintiff shall submit a proposed order that is verbatim to the Court's ruling and a proposed judgment conforming to the requirements in the Code of Civil Procedure and California Rules of Court, ideally on the appropriate Judicial Council form.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JMQ)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2026 Continued To Jun-09-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to June 09, 2026, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2025 Continued To Mar-10-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
